The bounded live OpenConstructionERP schedule surface is /api/v2/schedules/{schedule_id}/import (CSV upload) plus /api/v2/schedules/tasks/{task_id}/progress (task progress JSON), so local verifier data must provide per-phase schedule_id/task_id before phases-sync can pass."
  ]
}
